props.name: children
props.description: The content to be displayed in the scroll stack. Should contain ScrollStackItem components.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the scroll stack container.

props.name: itemDistance
props.description: Distance between stacked items in pixels.

props.name: itemScale
props.description: Scale increment for each stacked item.

props.name: itemStackDistance
props.description: Distance between items when they start stacking.

props.name: stackPosition
props.description: Position where the stacking effect begins as a percentage of viewport height.

props.name: scaleEndPosition
props.description: Position where the scaling effect ends as a percentage of viewport height.

props.name: baseScale
props.description: Base scale value for the first item in the stack.

props.name: scaleDuration
props.description: Duration of the scaling animation in seconds.

props.name: rotationAmount
props.description: Rotation amount for each item in degrees.

props.name: blurAmount
props.description: Blur amount for items that are further back in the stack.

props.name: useWindowScroll
props.description: Whether to use window scroll for the stack.

props.name: onStackComplete
props.description: Callback function called when the stack animation is complete.
